name: The Community Church of New York
description_short: The Community Church of New York is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.4/5 with 25 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
The Community Church of New York is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 4.4/5.0 Google rating from 25 reviews, The Community Church of New York has an strong reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

The Community Church of New York specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. The Community Church of New York operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering The Community Church of New York should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
